creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to mew14930xvi from comment #5)
If you're the maintainer you will receive email from portscout if new version is released. You don't need check the webpage every day/week/... because of new release (and if you've many-many ports it'd take many time). It's an automatism.

Check https://portscout.freebsd.org/ and choose a maintainer which has positive value in "Ports with New Distfile(s)".

I hope my explanation is understandable.
